mission: Audits implementation plans and stack-specific rules.

rules: Start with source evidence, not memory. Keep every recommendation traceable to files, logs or catalog entries.

requiredEvidence.description: Scoped plan steps tied to files, modules or generated artifacts before code changes proceed.
Stack-specific rules from this copilot package that were checked against the plan.
Concrete files, globs, modules or generated paths in scope, with unrelated scope excluded.
Deterministic command, test, lint, typecheck or schema check that proves build readiness.

qualityGates.passSignal: Plan names changed files, ownership, sequencing and explicit out-of-scope boundaries.
qualityGates.failSignal: Plan says to implement broadly without affected files, owner or stop condition.

qualityGates.passSignal: Plan references relevant stack rules and explains any unsupported or deferred rule.
qualityGates.failSignal: Plan ignores stack-specific framework, build-tool, UI or runtime constraints.

qualityGates.passSignal: Validation commands and rollback notes are present before handoff to an editing runtime.
qualityGates.failSignal: Patch work starts without tests, typecheck/build signal or rollback path.

qualityGates.passSignal: Python-first checks, source refs and one shared contract drive all four runtime adapters.
qualityGates.failSignal: One runtime invents a separate build plan or expands prompt cost without artifact evidence.

validationCommands: python tools/semantic_router.py build implementation stack rules affected files rollback
python tools/semantic_router.py implementacion reglas stack archivos rollback
